description: Person under 18 per source. Protected status; combatant only if source explicitly states.
Non-combatant aged 18+ with no more specific role stated by the source.
Licensed physician; only when source states occupation explicitly.
Nurse; only when source states occupation explicitly.
Medic, paramedic, or first-aid responder; source-stated only.
Teacher or education staff; source-stated only.
Journalist or media worker; source-stated only.
Humanitarian/relief worker. No dedicated boolean flag; capture via organization_affiliation and civilian_flag.
Political/civil leadership figure. Civilian vs combatant status is context-dependent; leave ambiguous unless source clarifies.
Senior military commander; combatant. Set both commander_flag and (optionally) leader_flag.
Armed fighter/combatant explicitly identified by source.
Role not stated or not verifiable from source. Default when in doubt.
